assessment_items.question_content:
**The apron scenes on either side of the St. Francis  altarpiece show how Francis was like [[☃ dropdown 1]].**



![](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/414d379b3ad7b816344788df029b755a.png)
hints: **The apron scenes, on either side of the central figure of St. Francis, are meant to show how Francis' life mimicked Christ's life.**

assessment_items.question_content:
St. Francis was the first Catholic saint to receive the stigmata, which [[☃ dropdown 1]].

![](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/35bcba86e62cb6d5013693532a7b346c.png)
hints: **The stigmata were the marks of the Crucifixion, which miraculously manifested as wounds on the hands, feet, and side of St. Francis.**

choices.content: was the special robe that he wore.
were the marks of the Crucifixion on his hands, feet, and side.
was the shaving of the top part of his head.

assessment_items.question_content:
**This altarpiece commemorates the life of St. Francis, who was a recent [[☃ dropdown 1]] in the Catholic Church when this altarpiece was made.**

![](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/e00e8f0eaf27d33689ead4c15c86ee0c.png)
hints: **This altarpiece commemorates the life of St. Francis, who was a recent saint in the Catholic Church when this altarpiece was made.**

assessment_items.question_content:
**This altarpiece is in a style that is a hybrid of the [[☃ dropdown 1]] style and the [[☃ dropdown 2]] style.**

![](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/e00e8f0eaf27d33689ead4c15c86ee0c.png)
hints: **This altarpiece is in a style that is a hybrid of medieval Italian styles and the Byzantine style from the neighboring Byzantine Empire.**
